Author: Fragtality

Settings.Tooltip: Automatically remove all PMDG Vehicles as they appear.
Automatically change Power Plug Type between GPU and Jetway depending on the Gate used.
Automatically toggle the Cargo Lights on the 777F when the Doors are operated or GSX becomes active.
Also Open or Close the Bulk Cargo Door when the other Cargo Doors are operated (Pax/Cargo).

Configure which PMDG Door is operated when GSX requests Service Door 1 (Front Catering Truck).
Per Default the 200's and Freighter will use 1R and the 300 the 2R Door.
Note: Selecting a specific Door here applies to all Variants - so different Profiles for each Variant are needed then.

The Plugin will set the PMDG Chocks via L-Var in Walkaround before the Plugin Connection is established.
This should prevent the GSX Menu not opening/getting Ready without Brakes or Chocks.

InstallUsageNotes:
IMPORTANT: DataBroadcast needs to be enabled in the 777_Options.ini File (for each Variant and Simulator)!
Consult the PMDG_777_MSFS_SDK Manual in the Aircraft's Documentation\SDK Folder.

RECOMMENDED: Use the internal/GSX provided Aircraft Profiles.
You eventually need to delete the gsx.cfg File in the SimObjects\Airplanes\PMDG 777... Folder.

NOTAMs:
• The Departure Services will start when the Flightplan is imported in the UFT
• The SmartButton is mapped to the MIC/INT Switch on the ACP (Captain and FO) - move to INT Position to trigger a Request
